name: Jamf Pro API
description: Jamf Pro API provides endpoints for managing Apple devices (macOS, iOS, iPadOS, tvOS). It includes both the modern Jamf Pro API and the Classic API. This spec covers the modern Jamf Pro API (v1) with core endpoints for authentication, computers, mobile devices, users, groups, policies, and more. The Classic API uses XML and is documented separately.
